race.comment: TOBIKKO (2) is a progressive galloper who was solid fresh then missed the frame but beaten only half a length last time. Drawn for a soft run behind a hot pace and with a good turn of foot gets chance to score. BARDIGRUB (4) ran on hard to finish runner-up here fresh, beaten just a head. Tricky gate but nice return and will give a sight. REINE OF NINE (14) charged home to finish a close-up sixth here last time behind SO POLITE. Better off at the weights and gets chance to turn the tables. SO POLITE (9) was a course and distance winner latest when leading throughout in heavy ground. Expected to take running down again.
